# CI evidence input

JSON input consumed by `harness evidence submit --kind ci`.

- Schema JSON: [evidence.ci.schema.json](../../../../schema/inputs/evidence.ci.schema.json)
- Registry entry: [schema/index.json](../../../../schema/index.json)
- Go type: `github.com/catu-ai/easyharness/internal/contracts.EvidenceCIInput`

## Root Shape

EvidenceCIInput is the JSON input consumed by `harness evidence submit --kind ci`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `provider` | `string` | no | Provider is the CI provider name when one is available. |
| `reason` | `string` | no | Reason is the human-readable explanation attached to the evidence record. |
| `status` | `string` | yes | Status is the CI result status. |
| `url` | `string` | no | URL is the CI run URL when one is available. |
